calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: August 29,2002
Judge Pro Tem; Karl Olson
Room 501A

Case called for settlement conference-All parties present. Off the record. Stipulated Judgment for plaintiff. Possession of premises located at34-6th St.#202.Defendant must vacate before 5:00 pm on Sept.15,2002 or writ will execute immediately. If defendant does not vacate on or before that date Plaintiff will have a judgment for back rent of $446.97 and damages of $20.46 per day from Aug 01,2002 thru Sept.15,2002 along with costs of $191.00 for a total judgment of $1,579.13.Any personal property left after Sept.15,2002 is deemed abandoned and may be disposed of as plaintiff sees fit.Each side to bear own attorney's fees and costs.
